title: PotionsGalore
description: i am working on a mod to add many more potions to the game
body:
the latest version has 5 potions and an effect is still in the code files without a potion. the potions are:
1. potion of dimminishing (usual, long and strong)
2. potion of growth (usual, long and strong)
3. mead
4. potion of climbing 
5. RAGE potion
6. fireball potion
**i am still working on many more features**
